description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes code on push to main, on pull requests to main, and on a weekly schedule. Run an ubuntu-22.04 job with read-only permissions to perform CodeQL analysis on multiple languages including C/C++, C#, Go, Java/Kotlin, JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Ruby, and Swift. For languages requiring manual build modes, install dependencies, download prebuilt SDKs, and build the code before analysis.
